questions.reference_script: Welcome to the National Museum of Science and Industry. Before your tour begins, please note that photography without flash is permitted in most galleries, but food and drinks are not allowed inside the exhibition halls. Today's guided tour will take you through three main sections: the history of transportation, the world of modern robotics, and a hands-on space for young visitors. If you have any questions during the tour, please feel free to ask one of our staff members. Enjoy your visit.

Tired of standing in long lines at the bank? With the new MoneyWise mobile app, you can check your balance, pay your bills, and transfer money to friends and family in just a few seconds. Our app is free to download, protected by advanced security, and available in five languages. Whether you are at home, at work, or traveling abroad, your account is always at your fingertips. Download MoneyWise today and take control of your finances.

questions.prompt: Describe the picture in as much detail as you can.
Describe the picture in as much detail as you can.

Imagine that a transportation company is conducting a survey in your city about how people travel. You have agreed to answer some questions. How do you usually travel to work or school, and how long does the journey take?
When you plan a long trip, how do you decide which form of transportation to use, and what is the most important factor for you?
Do you think your city should invest more in public transportation than in roads for private cars? Give reasons and examples to support your answer.
Hello, I'm planning to attend the technology conference next Friday. I don't have the agenda with me. What time does the opening session begin, and who is giving it?
questions.provided_info:
Future Technology Conference — Friday, October 3 (Riverside Convention Hall)
9:00 AM   Opening Address: The Next Decade of Innovation (Main Hall, Dr. Peter Nguyen)
10:00 AM  Workshop A: Artificial Intelligence in Daily Life (Room 1, Ms. Laura Kim)
11:30 AM  Workshop B: Cybersecurity for Small Business (Room 2, Mr. James Cole)
1:00 PM   Lunch (Garden Terrace)
2:00 PM   Workshop C: The Future of Remote Work (Room 1, Ms. Laura Kim)
3:30 PM   Product Showcase and Demonstrations (Exhibition Area)
5:00 PM   Closing Remarks and Prize Draw (Main Hall, Dr. Peter Nguyen)

questions.prompt: Many people spend a large part of their day using social media. Do you think social media brings people closer together, or does it make them feel more distant from one another? Give specific reasons and examples to support your opinion.
